entries.author: crussella0129@gmail.com
entries.text: Acme CSO confirmed 203.0.113.10 is the CEO's workstation and must remain out of scope for the duration of the engagement.

entries.author: crussella0129@gmail.com
entries.text: Payments endpoints are excluded per PCI scope separation; test environment is available on a separate engagement.

entries.author: crussella0129@gmail.com
entries.text: Engagement window aligns with Acme's scheduled maintenance to minimize blue-team confusion during the active test phase.
